earthquake_frequency.description: Mean frequency of large earthquakes capable of damaging important plant structures, used to compute P(earthquakes in 10 years) = 1 - e^{-0.2}.

wind_frequency.description: Mean frequency of damaging high winds, used to compute P(wind in 10 years) = 1 - e^{-0.4}.

P_damage_given_earthquake.description: Probability of structure damage during a strong earthquake, directly used in the damage probability calculation.

P_damage_given_wind.description: Probability of structure damage during high winds, directly used in the damage probability calculation.

time_period.description: The 10-year period over which the probability of building damage is being evaluated, used to compute Poisson occurrence probabilities.
